_note: TEMPLATE ONLY — not fact evidence. This documents the sanitized audit_log entry shape produced by backend/services/private_client.py for the selected-asset force-TTL refresh path. Real entries NEVER contain key/secret/signature/query/headers/balances/positions; only the five sanitized fields below.
_force_evicted_keys_comment: force=True evicts EXACTLY these three single-asset cache keys (never _cache.clear()): (GET,/papi/v1/margin/maxBorrowable,{asset:<base>}), (GET,/sapi/v1/margin/next-hourly-interest-rate,{assets:<base>,isIsolated:false}), (GET,/sapi/v1/margin/interestRateHistory,{asset:<base>}). Multi-asset scheduled-batch keys and shared 1h references (crossMarginData, account/info, classic) are preserved.
